commit_message:
Adds even/odd parity support to UART VC Adds even/odd parity support to UART VC UART VC can now add parity bits to Tx serial stream and decode them and throw parity errors on Rx stream. Additionally, the Tx stream can be forced to induce a parity error.

Fixes #492
